items.text:
Casting Call
Hathaleen: The Unexpected Journey to Palestine is a satirical black comedy drama PLAY about a British Zionist who unexpectedly travels to Palestine to prove to his ex-girlfriend that he isn't a Zionist, the reason for their breakup.

Currently casting for two roles:

Ahmed - a Palestinian villager (40s-60s)

The 90 minute play is about the Israel-Palestine conflict so requires actors who are comfortable dealing with that sensitive subject matter.

We will have a preview show on 10th July at The Source theatre before going to Camden Fringe 12-14th August and later Lambeth Fringe in October.

Looking for actors who are available for all performances. Rehearsals start ASAP in Stratford and will take place predominantly on Sundays.

Unfortunately this is an unpaid job offer but travel will be reimbursed and actors will receive the box split for their performances.

Please email u3008723@uel.ac.uk if you wish to apply

sharedPost.text:
✨ Zaproszenie na WARSZTATY AKTORSKO-TEATRALNE! ✨
Wspólnie działajMY ARTystycznie! 🎨🎬

Prowadzone przez Krzysztofa Berendta – aktora Teatr Miejski im. Witolda Gombrowicza w Gdyni! 🎭❤️

To spotkania dla WSZYSTKICH, którzy kochają teatr, sztukę i twórcze działanie – niezależnie od wieku i doświadczenia. 👨‍👩‍👧‍👦
Nie musisz być aktorem – wystarczy ciekawość, otwartość i chęć wspólnej zabawy! 🎉

🌟 Co czeka na uczestników?  
🎭 Ćwiczenia aktorskie i teatralne  
🎤 Praca z emocjami, głosem i ruchem  
🎭 Improwizacja i twórcza ekspresja  
💪 Budowanie pewności siebie i współpracy w grupie  
😊 Dużo radości, kreatywności i spotkania z żywym teatrem  

📅 **Harmonogram warsztatów:**  
📍 Konsulat Kultury | Gdyńskie Centrum Kultury  
🗓 31.05 | ⏰ 13:00–16:00  

📍 Teatr Miejski im. W. Gombrowicza  
🗓 1.06 | ⏰ 10:00–13:00 (grupa młodsza klasy IV-VIII)
                    i 18:00–21:00 

📍 Muzeum Miasta Gdyni  
🗓 6.06 | ⏰ 14:00–17:00  
🗓 7.06 | ⏰ 11:00–14:00  

📍 Konsulat Kultury | Gdyńskie Centrum Kultury  
🗓 8.06 | ⏰ 18:00–21:00  

📍 Biblioteka Pustki Cisowskie – Przystań Chabrowa 43  
🗓 13.06 | ⏰ 14:30–17:30  
🗓 28.06 | ⏰ 14:00–17:00  

📍 Muzeum Emigracji w Gdyni  
🗓 14.06 | ⏰ 13:00–16:00  
🗓 15.06 | ⏰ 18:00–21:00  

🎟 Udział w projekcie jest BEZPŁATNY! 🎉

💌 Zapisy: kdberendt@gmail.com  
(w zgłoszeniu prosimy podać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, wybraną datę warsztatu)

Projekt finansowany w ramach **Stypendium Artystycznego Miasta Gdyni** 🌟

Do zobaczenia na scenie! 🎭💫 #WarsztatyTeatralne #Gdynia #Teatr #Kreatywność #Sztuka Konsulat Kultury Gdynia Muzeum Emigracji w Gdyni Gdynia Kulturalna Gdynia Teatr Miejski im. items.text:
Allen Athletinnen und Athleten der neuen Staffel von Ninja Warrior Germany wünsche ich von Herzen alles Gute, maximale Konzentration, starke Nerven und genau den Mut, den es braucht, wenn aus Training plötzlich dieser eine entscheidende Moment vor Kamera, Publikum und Parcours wird.

Was mich an diesem Format seit Jahren fasziniert, ist die Mischung aus Sprungkraft, Griffkraft, Explosivität, Technik, Ausdauer, Willen und mentaler Stärke. Genau diese Verbindung aus Vorbereitung, Timing, Präzision und Leidenschaft kenne ich aus meiner eigenen Arbeit als Filmproduzent, Kameramann, Regisseur, Cutter, Content Creator, Darsteller und Gründer der Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Produktion Köln.

Bei Ninja Warrior Germany zählt nicht nur, wer stark ist. Es zählt, wer im richtigen Augenblick fokussiert bleibt, wer unter Druck klar denkt, wer trotz Risiko sauber entscheidet und wer nach einem Fehler wieder aufsteht. Genau diese Haltung verbindet Sport, Show, Film, Bühne, Social Media und echte Produktionserfahrung.

Ich wünsche allen Teilnehmerinnen und Teilnehmern eine starke Staffel, faire Runs, unvergessliche Bilder und den Mut, sich selbst genau dann zu übertreffen, wenn alle hinschauen.

Und allen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauern wünsche ich viel Freude, Spannung, Gänsehaut und diesen besonderen Moment, wenn man vor dem Bildschirm mitfiebert, obwohl man selbst gar nicht am Parcours hängt.

Beste Grüße, Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner 

#NinjaWarriorGermany #RTL #RTLStudios #Karrideo #ChristianWeiße

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**
*Produced by Jovial Giants Productions*

Jovial Giants Productions is seeking passionate, dedicated actors to bring *HALLOWED* to life — a chilling, faith-based thriller feature film that blends psychological tension with spiritual horror.

**📖 About the Film**
When a newly appointed priest arrives at a quiet rural church, he quickly discovers something is deeply wrong. The previous priest didn’t leave… he was sealed inside the old chapel. As whispers turn to revelations, the congregation’s expectations become terrifyingly clear — they believe he is next.

This is a story about faith under pressure, the weight of tradition, and the darkness that can hide behind devotion.

**🎥 Production Details**
* **Location:** Northeast Indiana area
* **Schedule:** June 20th-August 2nd (Weekends ONLY) 
* **Union Status:** Non-union
* **Compensation:** No pay; however, cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a passionate team

**🎭 Audition Instructions**
Please submit a **self-taped audition** using the provided [SIDES HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yfSzW3nqvyFyk00hxQ9Yz-1uJZiOUQCROhDxHKqTo5o/edit?usp=sharing). You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you. 

Email: **jovialgiants@gmail.com**
Subject Line: **ACTOR: HALLOWED**

**🎬 Character Breakdown**
* **Elias** – (20s-30s M LEAD) The new priest. Intelligent, compassionate, and searching for purpose. His journey is the emotional core of the film as he confronts fear, doubt, and truth.
* **Caleb** – (12yo M) Steady and devoted. Trusting others to a fault.
* **Mrs. Kline** – (50s-80s F) Composed, with a quiet authority. Speaks with conviction and carries the weight of the church’s past.
* **Deacon Marsh** – (40-60s M) Welcoming on the surface, but firm in his beliefs. Represents the polished, persuasive face of the congregation.
* **Deacon Sharp** – (50s-60s M) More rigid and intense than Marsh. His faith borders on fanaticism, and he doesn’t tolerate dissent.
* **The Presence** – (Male Voiceover) A mysterious force. Ominous, ambiguous, and deeply unnerving.
* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**

* **Compensation:** No pay; however, cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a passionate team

**🎭 Audition Instructions**
Please submit a **self-taped audition** using the provided [SIDES HERE](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1yfSzW3nqvyFyk00hxQ9Yz-1uJZiOUQCROhDxHKqTo5o/edit?usp=sharing). You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you. 

Email: **jovialgiants@gmail.com**
Subject Line: **ACTOR: HALLOWED**

**🎬 Character Breakdown**
* **Elias** – (20s-30s M LEAD) The new priest. Intelligent, compassionate, and searching for purpose. His journey is the emotional core of the film as he confronts fear, doubt, and truth.
* **Caleb** – (12yo M) Steady and devoted. Trusting others to a fault.
* **Mrs. Kline** – (50s-80s F) Composed, with a quiet authority. Speaks with conviction and carries the weight of the church’s past.
* **Deacon Marsh** – (40-60s M) Welcoming on the surface, but firm in his beliefs. Represents the polished, persuasive face of the congregation.
* **Deacon Sharp** – (50s-60s M) More rigid and intense than Marsh. His faith borders on fanaticism, and he doesn’t tolerate dissent.
* **The Presence** – (Male Voiceover) A mysterious force. Ominous, ambiguous, and deeply unnerving.
* **Hannah** – (20s-30s F) Sad and angry, Elias literally left her at the altar. 
* **Father Cole** – (60s-80s M) The previous priest. Appears through flashbacks or visions. A man who uncovered too much, too late.
* **Raven** – (7yo F) Intense and perceptive. She is more in touch with what is happening at the church and chapel than the others. 
* **The Driver** – (M or F) A figure who appears briefly but leaves a lasting impression. Loud, obnoxious, but friendly. 

**✨ Why Be Part of HALLOWED?**
This is more than just a film — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a haunting, thought-provoking story with a dedicated creative team. Whether you’re building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, *HALLOWED* offers a unique and memorable experience.

Step into the unknown. We’re excited to see what you bring.

**Submit your audition and join us.**
items.title: **🎬 CASTING CALL: “HALLOWED” 🎬**

Kære Alle. 

Vi søger akut statister til en reklamefilm, der filmes senere i dag. Vi filmer under Bispebuen i København fra klokken 19.30 - 21.00 

Vi søger både drenge og piger i alderen 15-17 år. Forældre/værge behøver ikke at deltage i optagelserne, men det er vigtigt at de skriver under på statistkontrakten. 

Hvis du eller dit barn er interesserede, så send gerne en SMS med et billede til vores koordinator Gül på følgende nummer: 42 53 23 22. 
Hun vil også kunne fortælle mere om optagelserne.

Jobbet er lønnet!

Projekt w pierwszych dniach Lipca 
❗️UWAGA ZGŁOSZENIA PRZYJMUJEMY DO NAJBLIŻSZEGO PIĄTKU❗️ 

Poszukujemy zdolnego Epizodysty w wieku 18-40 do przeprowadzenia sondy ulicznej   

Projekt będzie realizowany przez 5 dni na początku Lipca w Warszawie (czekamy na szczegoly od Produkcji) 
Zależy nam na Osobie otwartej, komunikatywnej 

Zgłoszenia proszę kierować na statysci@profesjatv.pl 

W treści wiadomości podajemy: 
• Imię i nazwisko
• wiek
• telefon kontaktowy
• aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki 
• link do wizytówki na YouTube 

W temacie podajemy: Epizodysta Lipiec 

Odezwiemy się ze szczegółami do wybranych Osób 

Wysyłając zgłoszenie wyrażają Państwo dobrowolną zgodę na przetwarzanie Danych Osobowych; RODO dla PROFESJA TV 

Pozdrawiamy 🙂

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL
Award-winning filmmakers KHonFilm are looking for Yorkshire-based actors for 3 roles in our Leeds-located short film ‘Passage of the Mule’. 

Our remaining available roles (all male-presenting) include:

Vincent: playing age 30+ (flexible on age)

James (bartender): playing age 20-25

Joe: playing age 20-25

No acting experience necessary! Filming expected to take place on a few dates between 1st-7th June, depending on availability. Self-tape required. Travel and food expensed. 

Message us here or on Instagram @khonfilm for more details!

items.text:
🎬 CASTING ACTORI & PASIONAȚI DE ACTORIE 🎬
Ai visat vreodată să joci într-un serial sau să faci parte dintr-un proiect cinematografic?

Căutăm persoane talentate, carismatice și pasionate de actorie pentru un proiect pilot aflat la început de drum. Vom realiza reel-uri și povești captivante, inspirate din situații reale, cu potențial de dezvoltare în proiecte mult mai ample.

✨ Nu contează dacă ai experiență sau ești la început – contează pasiunea, seriozitatea și dorința de a crea ceva frumos alături de noi!

✅ Filmări în București
✅ Atmosferă prietenoasă și profesională
✅ Ocazia de a-ți dezvolta portofoliul și experiența

Dacă simți că ți se potrivește, trimite-ne un mesaj în privat și spune-ne câteva lucruri despre tine.

📞 Înscrieri & informații:
Maria – 0752 562 519

Te așteptăm să facem împreună povești care merită spuse! 🎥✨

items.text:
Darmowa sesja zdjęciowa: Kobiecość i pewność siebie 📸✨
Szukam chętnych dziewczyn do sesji nie musisz mieć doświadczenia. Buduję portfolio, więc sesja jest całkowicie bezpłatna.

​O co chodzi?

Krótko: subtelne kadry, dużo gry światłem i pokazywanie kobiecej pewności siebie. Bez sztuczności, w Twoim tempie.

​Wymagania:

​Twoja przestrzeń: Sesja u Ciebie w domu/mieszkaniu (sypialnia, salon) lub w plenerze.

​Zgoda na publikację: Zależy mi na pokazaniu efektów w moim portfolio.

​Chcesz poczuć się wyjątkowo i dostać klimatyczne zdjęcia? Napisz tylko na priv po szczegóły! 📩

​#sesjafotograficzna #darmowasesja #kobiecość #fotografiaportretowa #sesjawdomu #portfolio

topComments.text: Poproszę w plenerze

!!! UWAGA!!! PILNE!!! UWAGA!!! PILNE!!!

Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Talarek (28)  – drobny złodziejaszek, parszywy wygląd, ale opanowany i inteligentny. 3 sceny 
DATA: 2.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Kaszecki (36) – napakowany trep, sportowe ubranie. 3 sceny 
DATA: 2.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Adwokat (36) – przy kasie, wyszczekany. 1 scena 
DATA: 6.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

- Adwokat (36) – przy kasie, wyszczekany. 1 scena 
DATA: 6.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
‼️ UWAGA GÓRNY ŚLĄSK – ZABRZE‼️
🎬 Do międzynarodowej produkcji filmowej, ze znakomitą obsadą, zapraszamy Panie i Panów (18–50 lat). Jeśli chcesz zobaczyć od środka, jak wygląda realizacja dużego projektu filmowego i przeżyć ciekawą przygodę na planie - SERDECZNIE ZAPRASZAMY❗️

❇️ KOGO SZUKAMY:  ludzi o charakterystycznym wizerunku komputerowych geeków, programistów, miłośników gier, AI i technologicznego świata.

📍 GDZIE:  w Zabrzu.

📅 KIEDY:  1 + 2 czerwca (plany nocne) + obowiązkowa przymiarka (szczegóły organizacyjne w formularzu ❗️)

💰 WYNAGRODZENIE: 450 zł netto*, płatne gotówką po drugim dniu planu (umowa o dzieło) / za 2 dni zdjęciowe + przymiarkę (+ ewentualne nadgodziny)

—

📩 ZGŁOSZENIA:

Wypełnij formularz online → przepisz do przeglądarki link z grafiki ( sqr.co/time ) lub zeskanuj kod QR.

—

⚠️ Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami.

Do zobaczenia na planie. 🎬

—￼

𝘗𝘩𝘰𝘵𝘰 𝘣𝘺 𝘕𝘰𝘯𝘴𝘢𝘱 𝘝𝘪𝘴𝘶𝘢𝘭𝘴 𝘰𝘯 𝘜𝘯𝘴𝘱𝘭𝘢𝘴𝘩, 𝘮𝘢𝘥𝘦 𝘣𝘺 𝘌𝘔.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of ‎eyeglasses and ‎text that says '‎Przygodana na planie וח nowym casting on-line geeki, (Panie i Panowie miłośnicy Komputerowe gier DAI 18-50 lat) ម្ន ετι by AC اسان Canede with sqr.co/time sqr.col time 1+2.06.2026 Stawka: 450 450złnetto zł netto Zabrze‎'‎‎

items.text:
👑 WOW… WHAT A RESPONSE! 👑

We have had a HUGE amount of interest for our Six Queens showcase performance for Majestic Academy of Performing Arts and not just students from our academy ✨

Thank you so much to everyone who has messaged, shared the post and shown interest already! *Please see all details on poster*

*The song you must sing MUST BE from SIX along with an introduction*

Please understand we can not answer multiple questions, all information is in the poster! 

Please note:
This is for our Festival Showcase Performance and not a full production of Six.

If you are not successful this time, please do not be discouraged 💜 We will also be casting for future showcase performances and building TWO performance teams for future events, competitions and opportunities.

Weekly training and rehearsals will take place in Chester ✨
We can’t wait to see all of your auditions Queens 👑

#Six #PerformingArts #MusicalTheatre #StageSchool #SixthForm

items.text:
This is a video clip of me, back in march of this year 2026 I was filmed on the Japanese Snacks Sampling TV Show Sekakura aired in Japan. Sekakura explore the differences & surprising similarities between Japan & the rest of the world from around the globe. I represented America, what a good experience I had. Watch there full episodes on YouTube channel & tv.

🇺🇸🫰🏻🇯🇵🌟🎥 https://youtu.be/IW_LofeVjLQ

#valien #richardplusfilms #richardflores #sekakura #japan #america

sharedPost.text:
🌞 GAUTENG – READY TO ROCK THE BEACH? 🌊

We’re looking for bold, talented, and passionate performers — and this is YOUR chance to audition for Teen Beach Production! 🎭✨

Bring the music, the moves, and the magic to life in a high-energy stage adventure packed with unforgettable songs and performances.

It’s not just an audition — it’s your invite to be part of something exciting, to share the spotlight with other amazing performers, and to create memories that will last forever. 🌟

💌 Your audition pack is waiting! Email rykenprojects@gmail.com to claim it.
📍 Rehearsals & Casting in Gauteng
🎶 Shows in Cape Town – January 2026
💸 Production fee includes travel costs, accommodation in Cape Town, food outings, and more!
👥 Ages 16 – 24

⚡ The stage is set. The waves are calling. Now it’s YOUR time to shine!

items.text:
*INCREDIBLY URGENT*

"Brody had his suspicions. His brother and his wife together? could it be... Or at least that is what he thought until his brother was found dead. Stabbed they said. The killer no where is sight. So why is it his wife seems so nervous..."

Come star in our 3 part Micro Drama student film. Looking for 3 actors, two men aged between 25 and 35, and a woman of the same age.

28th May (4pm-9pm) - Smallfield, Horley (Location).

Travel and food will be paid for.

If you are interested, please email us with a headshot of yourself and any past experience that may be relevant!

elliottfoster17@outlook.com (Elliott), carterelijah@gmail.com  (Elijah), or 22308662@bnu.ac.uk (Finn).

Hiya!! ✨

We are currently looking for:
* ﻿﻿Two grandparents
* Aged between 60-75

The shoot is a photography campaign for a luxury property developer and the images will be used across marketing materials and social media channels.

Shoot Details:

Date: Saturday 30th May

Location: Calverley Park, Tunbridge Wells, UK

Time: Starts 1pm 

Duration: Approximately 4-5 hours

Payout: £100 p.p. all-in

In case you are interested and available, send a DM or email to harper@disstrikt.nl. Don't forget to attach a couple photos of yourself for reference. 🎀

items.text:
Hey everyone, my name is Elias from 2 Liters Shady Films and I just released a new trailer for my indie horror feature film, Mocos. If you have a few minutes of your time, I’d really appreciate you checking it out.

I’m an independent filmmaker currently writing, editing, and filming the project myself, so every view, like, comment, and share truly goes a long way in supporting indie creators like me. 

I’m still actively filming and looking for anyone interested in getting involved with the feature film. No experience is necessary, and I have a ton of remote self-film scenes available that can be done right from the comfort of your own home using my detailed instructions.

If interested, feel free to message me directly or email me at mocosthemovie@gmail.com

Thank you again for the support and for helping independent horror continue to grow!

https://youtu.be/UcvK93KTtzY?si=_KVtQ_4leSnZgkw3

items.text:
CASTING CALL — TV HOSTSNew Lifestyle & House Hunting Television Series
**LOS ANGELES BASED**

A major new lifestyle / house-hunting television series is now casting experienced on-camera hosts based in Los Angeles.

We are searching for a charismatic **male or female host**, aged approximately **30–45**, with a polished on-screen presence and strong television experience.

This is a professionally produced property and lifestyle series that will include:

* House hunting
* Property walkthroughs
* Lifestyle storytelling
* Some travel

We are looking for talent who can confidently connect with viewers while demonstrating genuine knowledge and passion for:

* Real estate
* Home design
* Architecture
* Lifestyle trends
* Luxury living

**IDEAL CANDIDATES WILL HAVE:**

* Proven experience hosting television programs or digital series
* Strong presenting and interviewing skills
* Professional, mature and glamorous on-camera presence
* Ability to improvise naturally on camera
* Excellent communication and storytelling ability
* Knowledge of property, interiors and home design
* Availability for one-day episode shoots

**PROJECT DETAILS:**

* Non-union
* Low per-episode hosting fee
* Each episode filmed in one shoot day
* Some travel may be required

**TO APPLY:**

Please email the following:

* Recent headshot/photos
* Resume or hosting credits
* Links to hosting reel or previous television work
* A short self-tape introducing yourself and explaining:
   * Your hosting experience
   * Your interest in property and home design
   * Why you would be perfect for this series

**SELF-TAPE GUIDELINES:**

Please keep your video under 2 minutes and film in a bright, quiet location.

If possible, include a short walkthrough of a stylish room, property, or home space while presenting to camera.

**SEND SUBMISSIONS TO:**

**Casting Director**

[info@abode-ent.com](mailto:info@abode-ent.com)  

Subject Line:

**HOUSE HUNTING HOST CASTING – YOUR NAME**

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

items.summary:
CASTING CALL — TV HOSTSNew Lifestyle & House Hunting Television Series
**LOS ANGELES BASED**

A major new lifestyle / house-hunting television series is now casting experienced on-camera hosts based in Los Angeles.

We are searching for a charismatic **male or female host**, aged approximately **30–45**, with a polished on-screen presence and strong television experience.

This is a professionally produced property and lifestyle series that will include:

* House hunting
* Property walkthroughs
* Lifestyle storytelling
* Some travel

We are looking for talent who can confidently connect with viewers while demonstrating genuine knowledge and passion for:

* Real estate
* Home design
* Architecture
* Lifestyle trends
* Luxury living

**IDEAL CANDIDATES WILL HAVE:**

* Proven experience hosting television programs or digital series
* Strong presenting and interviewing skills
* Professional, mature and glamorous on-camera presence
* Ability to improvise naturally on camera
* Excellent communication and storytelling ability
* Knowledge of property, interiors and home design
* Availability for one-day episode shoots

**PROJECT DETAILS:**

* Non-union
* Low per-episode hosting fee
* Each episode filmed in one shoot day
* Some travel may be required

**TO APPLY:**

Please email the following:

* Recent headshot/photos
* Resume or hosting credits
* Links to hosting reel or previous television work
* A short self-tape introducing yourself and explaining:
   * Your hosting experience
   * Your interest in property and home design
   * Why you would be perfect for this series

**SELF-TAPE GUIDELINES:**

Please keep your video under 2 minutes and film in a bright, quiet location.

If possible, include a short walkthrough of a stylish room, property, or home space while presenting to camera.

**SEND SUBMISSIONS TO:**

**Casting Director**

[info@abode-ent.com](mailto:info@abode-ent.com)  

Subject Line:

**HOUSE HUNTING HOST CASTING – YOUR NAME**

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

items.text:
He had no training. No agent. No industry connections.

He started acting at 41.

Now he has over 600 credits.

I see so many people talk themselves out of pursuing acting before they've even tried — convinced they're too old, too late, too far behind.

This lesson gives you the perfect strategy for building your career, whether you're 21 or 71.

The link to the full lesson is in the comments.

Share this with someone who keeps saying "maybe one day" 👇

sharedPost.text:
Open Casting 🎤✨

Vil du være ansigtet på et nyt projekt? 🎬

Jeg søger en kreativ performer til at fortolke mine sange, som allerede er færdigproducerede. Du behøver ikke at kunne synge - kun at være supergod til at performe. Det hele handler om attitude, udtryk og indlevelse 🔥

Sådan gør du:

Se mit 30-sekunders sanguddrag herunder 🎧
Hvis du kan lide musikken, og sangen giver mening for dig, så er næste skridt at lave en kort selfie-video.

Sæt dig ned, få en idé til en selfie-video, hvor du mimer til det her uddrag af sangen, og spring ud i det 🎥
Videoen skal være i vandret format, og du har kreativt frie hænder.

Det, jeg går op i, er timing - at det ser ud, som om du synger, og at du giver sangen et visuelt liv. Du skal fortolke den på en måde, som føles både autentisk og medlevende 🖤

Når du har lavet en kort video, hvor du selv føler, at du har lavet en god udgave, så send videoen via dette audition-link:

WeTransfer:
https://profilfoto.wetransfer.com/

Send også samtidig en besked til mekel@haunsby.com, hvor du kort fortæller, hvad du synes, sangen handler om.

Videoen er KUN til intern vurdering. Den bliver IKKE delt offentligt 🔒

Det her er et betalt projekt, men med ultralavt budget i starten. Hvis samarbejdet fungerer og skaber opmærksomhed, er der mulighed for flere sange og bedre betaling fremover 🚀

Men du skal først og fremmest gøre det her, fordi du synes, det lyder sjovt og spændende - ikke som en indtægtskilde.

Du kan læse mere om mig her:
https://vizionizer.com/mekel-haunsby/

Og du kan se eksempler på musikvideoer, jeg har lavet, her:
https://www.youtube.com/@HaunsbyMusic

FABRICAMOS TU COLUMPIO RUSO O MODELOS A MEDIDA - CALIDAD QUE IMPULSA TU ACTUACIÓN

En Mundo Circense-SXE fabricamos equipo profesional diseñado para acrobacias y artes circenses.
 
Creamos columpios rusos o cualquier modelo a medida y con el diseño de tu preferencia, pensando en ofrecerte máxima seguridad, resistencia y confianza en cada presentación:
✅ Seguridad: Estructura estable y materiales de alta calidad
✅ Resistencia: Elaborados con acero de primera categoría
✅ Durabilidad: Acabados profesionales para uso intensivo
✅ Personalización total: Medidas, acabados y diseño adaptados exactamente a lo que necesites
 
Ideales para circo, acrobacias y artes escénicas, son equipo confiable para artistas profesionales: fáciles de instalar, con diseño funcional y seguro, y con garantía de fábrica.
 
Realizamos envíos nacionales e internacionales para que recibas tu equipo donde lo necesites. ¡Equipamos tus sueños, construimos tu éxito!
 
📞 Contáctanos: +51 994 195 258
 
 
 
🏷️ HASHTAGS:
 
#MundoCircense #ColumpioRuso #EquipoCircense #ArtesCircenses #Acrobacias #CircoProfesional #ModelosAMedida #DiseñoPersonalizado #EquipoParaArtistas #SeguridadYResistencia #EnvíosNacionales #EnvíosInternacionales #EquipoCircensePerú

items.text:
🎭 CASTING CALL – ROMEO AND JULIET (Kathmandu Valley | Lambeth Fringe 2026) 🎭
We are casting local performers based in Nepal (Kathmandu Valley) for a bold new stage adaptation of Romeo and Juliet, heading to Lambeth Fringe 2026 (UK).

This is a contemporary, cross-cultural production that reimagines Shakespeare through movement, text, and grounded performance. We are looking for committed, expressive actors who are excited to work collaboratively and bring fresh energy to a classic story.

Roles available:

Romeo, Juliet, Mercutio, Tybalt, Friar Laurence, Nurse, and ensemble performers.

Location: Kathmandu Valley (rehearsals)

Festival: Lambeth Fringe 2026, London (UK tour)

Eligibility: Open to Nepal-based performers only

📩 To apply:

Send your CV, headshot, and a short self-tape (1–2 minutes introducing yourself and/or performing Shakespeare) to:

yuensunyeefilms@gmail.com

Subject line: R&J Casting – [Your Name] – Role Applying For

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted with audition details.

A timeless story, retold from Kathmandu to London.

themselves than ever before 🎭

The Addams Family West End Summer Experience is designed to help young performers grow through creativity, teamwork, performance, and unforgettable experiences both on and off the stage.

This isn’t just about performing.

It’s about building confidence, friendships, discipline, and memories they’ll carry forever ❤️‍🔥

✨ No experience needed

✨ Safe & supportive environment

Your child’s next big opportunity could start with one audition 👀

items.text:
This is a video clip of me, back in march of this year 2026 I was filmed on the Japanese Snacks Sampling TV Show Sekakura aired in Japan. Sekakura explore the differences & surprising similarities between Japan & the rest of the world from around the globe. I represented America, what a good experience I had. Watch there full episodes on YouTube channel & tv.

🇺🇸🫰🏻🇯🇵🌟🎥 https://youtu.be/IW_LofeVjLQ

#valien #richardplusfilms #richardflores #sekakura #japan #america

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

items.previewTitle: ⚡ Masz energię, którą pokocha kamera? My mamy casting dla branży energetycznej! ⚡ – UNAGI MEDIA
items.previewDescription: Do energetycznej reklamy poszukujemy naturalnych, charyzmatycznych osób z prawdziwą energią!Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, całe rodziny oraz osoby, które po prostu mają w sobie autentyczność i swobodę.

sharedPost.text:
⚡️Masz energię, którą pokocha kamera? My mamy casting dla branży energetycznej! ⚡️

! NOWY CASTING ! ATRAKCYJNA STAWKA ! ENERGETYCZNY PLAN !

STAWKI:
Od 4 do 9 000 zł !!!

Poszukujemy:
Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, całe rodziny oraz osoby, które po prostu mają w sobie autentyczność i swobodę.

ROLE GŁÓWNE:

Para – 30-35 lat

Szukamy zgranego duetu z fajną energią i naturalnością. Mile widziane prawdziwe pary, ale pojedyncze osoby też są ok.

EPIZODY:

Kasjer na stacji paliw– (wiek nieokreślony)- konkretny, spokojny i kompetentny pracownik stacji paliw.

Rodzice 30-35 lat + dziecko (8 miesięcy- 1,5 roku)

Chętnie cała rodzina. Dziecko powinno chodzić lub stawiać pierwsze kroki. Zależy nam na ciepłej, naturalnej relacji i spontaniczności.

Para około 25 lat

Szukamy naturalnej pary z lekkim, niewymuszonym humorem. Pojedyncze osoby również mile widziane.

Przyjaciele na koncercie/studenci – 19-29 lat

Mężczyzna ok. 40-50  lat

Tutaj pan musi lubić psy, dobrze się z nimi komunikować i nie może mieć uczulenia. Miło jeśli ktoś ma swojego psa – poszukujemy kundelka.

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:

WIZYTÓWKA + SCENKA

TIMING:

28.05 -Termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 19.00

03.06 – Recall

11.06 – Przymiarki

15.06 lub 16.06 – Zdjęcia w Warszawie

Link do castingu i opis scenki do nagrania:
unagimedia.pl/casting058/

ZGŁOSZENIA:

Zgłoszenie mailowe zawierające imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu + zdjęcie + link do video wizytówki + nagranie scenki proszę przesłać na: casting@unagimedia.pl

Tytuł: 058

Nie zwalniaj- wejdź do gry i zgłoś się już dziś!

items.text:
🚨!!CASTING CALL!!🚨
🚨!!CASTING NOTICE!!🚨

Hello! My name is Reve Hriczko. I'm an independent filmmaker with my own independent film studio called Two Fold Films. We are currently casting for our upcoming 2028 horror film titled "Camp Red Lake." Below I've attached posters detailing all information you could possibly need for your audition as well as the audition form! Filming will be between May-August of 2027 in the Lehigh Valley, Pennsylvania. This is not paid work!! I'm very excited to work more on this project as it's been in the works for 2 years already.

Please share and audition! Feel free to reach out with any questions or concerns. You may dm me, comment on this post, or email Twofoldfilmsofficial@gmail.com

We also post a lot on our instagram @twofoldfilmsofficial and you can dm us there as well.

I look forward to seeing everyone's auditions!

https://forms.gle/kUouZ3eddEpaj59w5

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE CASTING CALL NOW CASTING AGES 14-99 Self-Tape Auditions Deadline: July 24, 2026 June, 1985. A group of lifelong friends return to the caTp they'v loved since childhood Until a masked figure turns their summer fun into a nightmare.'

May be an image of text that says 'CAMP RED LAKE HOW TO AUDITION Step One: Read through the character descriptions listed on the audition form and in our bio! Step Two: Find a monologue you like that best shows off your abilities! Step Three: Film a self-tape! Step four: Fill out the aud audition form found in our bio and submit your tape! Step five: Wait to hear from us! :)'

May be an image of text that says 'Cap mpRed Red Lake NoW Casting Teen Roles: Mikey Harris (16) rebellious teen fresh out of juvie who's stuck at caTp with an ankle monitor. Megan Murphy (18) A strict, competitive overachiever and our protagonist's longtime rival. Zachary Windham (18)-A (18) loyal and kind-hearted jock Tiffany Hill (17) bubbly, Bowie-loving girly girl Jay Barnes -A laid-back caTp counselor everyone likes Amanda Smith (18)- Zach's flirty ex-girlfriend who loves creating tension and drama. Andy Zimmerman (16) nerdy and shy magician •Courtney Barclay (17)- An outgoing and kind new girl who people often get the wrong impression of'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says 'Camp Red Lake Now casting: Extras! Want to join in on the CaTp Red Lake casting fun, but don't want to read lines? We got you! Fill out section 2 of our audition form for extras only!'

topComments.text: Is it ok to submit my acting reel vs monologue?
Will you be looking for a makeup artist as well?  I am right by Lehigh Valley.  I just sent you a DM introducing myself as well.

items.text:
LOGLINE

A wannabe mobster uses an app to relive — and fix — a past betrayal. But after multiple glitches, he finds himself stuck on app support hold and turns to the dark web for a solution to his clone chaos.

APPS is currently in post-production, and we’re looking for a Sound Mixer to help support the film’s final audio and sound mix. 🎧

Toronto-based preferred. This role will be remote.

This is a self-funded debut project with limited resources. A small honorarium will be provided, and you will receive credit for your work.

If interested, please send a short introduction along with your reel, portfolio, or samples of your work to:
STUDIO2425FILMS@GMAIL.COM

Thank you so much!

items.summary:
LOGLINE

A wannabe mobster uses an app to relive — and fix — a past betrayal. But after multiple glitches, he finds himself stuck on app support hold and turns to the dark web for a solution to his clone chaos.

APPS is currently in post-production, and we’re looking for a Sound Mixer to help support the film’s final audio and sound mix. 🎧

Toronto-based preferred. This role will be remote.

This is a self-funded debut project with limited resources. A small honorarium will be provided, and you will receive credit for your work.

If interested, please send a short introduction along with your reel, portfolio, or samples of your work to:
STUDIO2425FILMS@GMAIL.COM

Thank you so much!

Für einen Werbedreh in Stuttgart mit Bezug zur Weltmeisterschaft suchen wir noch Komparsen im alter von 12-18 Jahren, Jungen und Mädchen, die gut bis sehr gut Fußball spielen können. 

Das ganze ist leider sehr Spontan und findet bereits morgen statt. 

Bei Interesse bitte direkt 1-2 Fotos mit schicken. 
Vielen Dank und vielleicht bis morgen.

topComments.text: Ich habe dir übrigens schon einmal in den Kommentaren bei einem ähnlichen Beitrag geschrieben, dass man dir leider keine DM schicken kann und auch keine E-Mail-Adresse für Bewerbungen angegeben ist.
Es gibt auch gar kein Hinweis über die Gage?!

Do sesji rekwizytowej poszukujemy zdjęcia dojrzałej, ciepłej kobiety w wieku powyżej 60 lat

Zdjęcie zostanie wykorzystane w scenie na okładce magazynu dla kobiet 

💰 Stawka: 40 zł netto  
(płatne przelewem po odesłaniu wypełnionej umowy)

📅 Termin nadsyłania zgłoszeń:  
23 maja, godz. 20:00  

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com  
Temat wiadomości: „zdjęcie”

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:  
– imię i nazwisko  
– wiek  
– 2 przykładowe zdjęcia (selfie)  

📸 Wymagania do zdjęć:  
– bez osób towarzyszących  
– bez nakryć głowy  
– bez okularów  
– tło dowolne  

⚠️ Osoba wysyłająca zdjęcie musi posiadać pełne prawa do jego wykorzystania.

Zapraszamy! 🎥

items.text:
Ever wonder how much child actors make for a quick set day? 👀🎬

We drove up to LA from San Diego and were there less than an hour and a half total.

That amount is AFTER taxes, Coogan account contributions, and agency fees were already taken out.

Honestly, it still surprises me compared to what I made at my first job.
Would you have guessed it would be more or less? 👀

items.text:
🎭 THE METHOD THAT LEAD ME TO BOOK NETFLIX AND FEATURE FILM ROLES
After speaking to hundreds of actors, I keep hearing the same thing:

You sit in class for hours…
but only get 15–20 minutes actually working.

You bounce between different teachers, all with different methods.

Then you get notes like:
“Make it more believable.”
“Be more truthful.”
“Make stronger choices.”

…but no one really explains HOW to do that.

No clear exercises.
No actual technique you can repeat.
No real way to track improvement.

So you leave class overthinking and confused about how to actually get better.

Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and LEAD roles in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on ONCE UPON A TIME.

Acting is an incredibly competitive industry, and honestly, I see it a lot like professional sport.

Athletes don’t just play games. They train specific skills over and over so that when it’s time to compete, they have an edge.

Acting should be no different.

That’s why I created my groundbreaking acting program containing all the tools that have led to my success booking work.

🎬 1-hour private Zoom sessions.

The outcome:
An actor who is confident embodying a variety of characters and who can deliver emotionally impactful performances consistently leading to an actor who BOOKS WORK.

If this resonates with you, comment ACTING below or better yet, send me a DM 🤗

Hey guys!! Happy Summer!!! Classes are now open for June! We teach the business part other classes leave out - how to get repped once you're ready for rep, how to make sure your headshots are working for you, how to expand rep into other markets, etc -- all while doing a deep dive into TV, film, and commercial. We also offer incredible, informative VO classes for actors wanting to get into voice work!  Would love to have you with us for June! Teachers have all been working in the business for 10+ years professionally. Come learn from Film/Commercial Casting Directors, NYC/LA agents, and VO casting professionals!

To learn more about the classes we offer, please visit: www.sarahdowlingcasting.com/actors

To register or ask any questions, please email us at: SarahDowlingCasting@gmail.com

Thanks!

items.text:
Casting male actor in the 40-50s age range- should be attractive, brown hair.
This is a lead role in the film with roughly 4-5 short scenes with very minimal dialogue. 

PLEASE NOTE: this is a student film, it is no pay but all actors will receive IMDb credits. 

Synopsis:

Unforgettable is a story of a woman’s desperate attempt to get pregnant and on her journey, gets an unexpected message from her beloved Grandfather from the afterlife.

And how the signs along the way of her journey, whispered to her, what gifts would be put in her path. A true story of one woman’s synchronicity and love. 

FILMING IN THE LOS ANGELES AREA. Actors MUST be local to LA or the San Fernando Valley!

If you are interested or know someone who might fit the role please DM me! Thank you!

items.text: Hi everyone. I have a question regarding an application process  through an agency called" Stark Talent" which is operating in the Yorkshire area. I was successful after sending my portfolio, for a role as a "Tv Background artist" ,however they are now requiring from me an amount to pay (£45) for a professional shooting with their photographer. They have sent documentation, including salary and terms of agreement.  They also request a fee of £25 which is deducted when you get your first job. They mention a commission fee of 25%, which seems to be a bit high , I would have thought a 15% commission would be  more reasonable. I am not sure why they are asking me to pay for the shooting ,  has anyone heard of this agency before, and have you ever paid for a shooting prior registering with a talent agency? Is this a normal thing in the industry? Thanks in advance.

topComments.text: According to companies house they dissolved last year
I dont pay anything to the agencies I'm with they just take a comission when they get me work and its not 25%

items.text:
Hey everyone — I’m Eoin, an Irish screen actor working between Dublin and Bangkok, with regular availability in London, currently looking to expand my presence in the UK market and connect with strong creative collaborators.

Recent credits include *Strike Back*, *The Singapore Grip*, *The Creator*, and DR Denmark’s *Arvingerne / The Legacy*.

I also wrote, executive produced, and starred in the feature film *Kiss of the Con Queen*, based on my real-life encounter with the “Hollywood Con Queen” scam case.

Open to film, television, shorts, and strong independent projects.

Spotlight: [https://app.spotlight.com/4938-8943-6769](https://app.spotlight.com/4938-8943-6769)
Showreel: [https://youtu.be/EI4sZCqdQL0](https://youtu.be/EI4sZCqdQL0)

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/eoin_obrien1/

#IrishActor #ScreenActor #SpotlightActor #CastingCallsUK #FilmActor #TVActor #Thriller #Drama

sharedPost.text:
Note to those who cast actors:
What Actors Actually Do When You Give Them 48 Hours

We talk a lot in this industry about “quick turnarounds” and “self-tape in 24 hours.” What doesn’t get talked about enough is what that actually requires from the actor on the other end.

I recently had a casting opportunity with a 48-hour turnaround. Here’s what went into saying yes:

1. Rearranging real life
I cancelled plans with family to make sure I understood the character and learnt the sides properly. Half-prepared work helps no one.

2. Clearing the schedule  
I spent the next day reorganising commitments for the shoot days and put other work on hold in case I got the role. That’s standard practice if you want to be professional and available.

3. Treating it like the job it is
Even at the audition stage, this is time, focus, and energy. Actors invest it upfront because we know that’s what it takes to do the work justice.

I share this not to complain, but to give context. When casting teams move fast, it’s appreciated. But communication matters.

On this occasion, I found out 5 hours before my Zoom audition that they’d changed their mind and gone with another actor. After rearranging my week to be available, that felt disrespectful to the process and the time already invested.

How you handle that process tells actors a lot about what it would be like to work with you. For me, professionalism goes both ways. I’ll always respect tight timelines and do the work to meet them. In return, I look for the same respect for the process and the people in it.

The industry runs on relationships. How we treat each other in the small moments is what determines whether people want to work together again.

#casting #castingcalls #castingdirector #producer #producerlife #production
#UKCasting #LondonActors #ManchesterActors
#BritishTV #UKFilmIndustry
#EquityUK #SpotlightActors #CastingNetwork

items.text:
🤍 **MODEL & ACTOR CASTING CALL** 💙

**Otwieramy rekrutację dla nowych twarzy!**
Do naszych nadchodzących produkcji fotograficznych, reklamowych, teatralnych oraz fabularnych poszukujemy** dzieci w wieku 4–16 lat.**

Szukamy dzieci, które wyróżniają się urodą, energią i talentem. Mile widziane są osoby odważne, kreatywne i swobodnie czujące się przed aparatem oraz kamerą.

💙 Jeśli Twoje dziecko marzy o przygodzie w świecie modelingu i aktorstwa, wyślij zgłoszenie na adres: **biuro@elsastudio.pl**

**W treści maila prosimy o podanie:**
• imienia i nazwiska dziecka
• wieku
• wzrostu
• miejsca zamieszkania
• numeru telefonu do rodzica
• informacji o doświadczeniu aktorskim lub modelingowym

**Do zgłoszenia prosimy dołączyć:**
🤍 aktualne zdjęcia portretowe oraz sylwetki
💙 krótkie nagranie, w którym dziecko przedstawia się i opowiada o swoich zainteresowaniach

Czekamy na Wasze zgłoszenia! 🤍
Elsa studio

sharedPost.text:
Sesja zdjęciowej dla klienta z branży eventowo - biznesowej! Poszukujemy dzieci:

🔹 Dziewczynki, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/7dade83ff01142b4ae0a848c8c136b88

🔹 Chłopcy, 8-10 lat (z dokumentami do PIP)
https://casting-app.pl/apply/46ba1a3b82f24c3db879179f2203a199

📍 Termin zdjęć: 5 czerwca 
📍 Miejsce: Warszawa 
📍 Charakter zdjęć: dzienne

💰 Stawka: 300 zł za dzień zdjęciowy
(płatne gotówką po planie) 

📸 Wymagania:
Otwarte, śmiałe. Proszę o zdjęcia z uśmiechem, w ruchu, podczas zabawy. Link z wizytówką będzie dodatkowym atutem.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać tylko przez linki zamieszczone pod nazwą roli. W razie dodatkowych pytań kontakt na: sky.zgloszenie@gmail.com

❗ Zgłoszenia na maila nie będą rozpatrywane.

items.text:
I went through emerging artist LA & got signed to my agency! 

Now I’m helping you do the same! 

It’s been so fun being on set and getting more quality auditions & the training I got from emerging artists before their agency showcase has really carried me through my acting career.

Emerging Artist LA got Max Torina from Disney Channel signed originally & Elle Paris Legaspi from the reboot of party of 5! 

And they’re opening their doors to more actors. 

Train, go to an agency showcase, and hopefully get signed! 

Here’s their sign up link 

https://www.studiotalentsearch.com/

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'ALL AGES: KIDS, TEENS & ADULTS E EMERGING ARTISTLA NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED LOCATED IN ORANGE COUNTY, LA, AND SOCAL AGENTS ARE LOOKING FOR NEW TALENT, ARE YOU ΝΕΧΤ? 0.0o SCAN HERE to APPLY GET DISCOVERED. GET ON SCREEN. •PERFORM & POTENTIALLY GET SIGNED •ACTING, AC MODELING SINGING TRAINING ·GET SEEN BY REAL TALENT AGENTS •WORK WITH INDUSTRY PROFESSIONALS •ALL EXPERIENCE LEVELS WELCOME •A SAFE, SUPPORTIVE ENVIRONMENT PARENT-APPROVED PROGRAMS TRUSTED, CERTIFIED INDUSTRY PARTNERS. WE PARTNER ONLY WITH TRUSTED, CERTIFIED TALENT AGENCIES. *MUST HAVE PARENT OR LEGAL GAURDIAN PERMISSION APPLY UNDER 18 YEARS OLD @EMERGINGARTISTLA'

items.text:
Szukam 2 aktorów do etiudy Studenckiej.
🎭 ADAM         [3 dni zdjęciowe ]

Wiek: 28–35 lat

Impulsywny i bardziej emocjonalny z dwójki policjantów. Często działa szybciej niż myśli, łatwo daje się ponieść frustracji i napięciu. W sytuacjach stresowych próbuje przejmować inicjatywę, ale wraz z kolejnymi wydarzeniami jego pewność siebie zaczyna pękać.

Rola opiera się na dużej ekspresji emocjonalnej, narastającym strachu i stopniowej utracie kontroli nad sytuacją.

🎭 WIĘZIEŃ      [1 dzień zdjęciowy ] 

Wiek: 30–50 lat

Niepokojąco spokojny mężczyzna eskortowany przez policjantów przez las. Mimo kajdanek sprawia wrażenie, jakby czuł się pewniej od swoich oprawców. Z pozoru bierny, jednak jego zachowanie i reakcje budują ciągłe napięcie oraz poczucie, że może wiedzieć o sytuacji więcej niż pozostali bohaterowie.

Postać oparta głównie na atmosferze, spojrzeniu i sposobie bycia.

Film opowiada historię dwóch policjantów eskortujących więźnia przez las. Po wejściu w głąb lasu zaczynają gubić orientację, a każda próba odnalezienia wyjścia prowadzi ich z powrotem do tego samego miejsca. Z czasem sytuacja zaczyna wymykać się logice, a napięcie między bohaterami stopniowo narasta.

To thriller psychologiczny z elementami pętli czasowej  i stopniowego rozpadu psychiki bohaterów. Duży nacisk kładę na atmosferę, emocje oraz relację między postaciami. Proszę o wiadomość prywatną jeśli jesteś zainteresowany wraz ze zdjęciem twarzy i sylwetki. 

Pozdrawiam 

📍 [Warszawa , okolice ]

📅 [pierwsza połowa czerwca  ]

💰 Non profit - Portfolio 

🥪 Zapewniamy wyżywienie na planie

items.text:
!!! UWAGA!!! PILNE!!! UWAGA!!! PILNE!!!

Do najnowszego odcinka GLINIARZY realizowanego w Warszawie oraz bliskich okolicach szukam PANÓW:

- Talarek (28)  – drobny złodziejaszek, parszywy wygląd, ale opanowany i inteligentny. 3 sceny 
DATA: 2.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Kaszecki (36) – napakowany trep, sportowe ubranie. 3 sceny 
DATA: 2.06
STAWKA: 500 zł netto

- Adwokat (36) – przy kasie, wyszczekany. 1 scena 
DATA: 6.06
STAWKA: 300 zł netto

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem (najlepiej w formie linka na youtube)
- Aktualne zdjęcie
- Informacja czy grali Państwo w przeszłości w Gliniarzach

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

🌟 CASTING CALL: JAPANESE TALENT IN WARSAW! 🌟

We are looking for people of Japanese descent to feature in an upcoming commercial! 🎥✨
If you are based in or near Warsaw and available for a shoot at the end of May, we want to hear from you. 
This is a fantastic opportunity with highly competitive pay! 💸

📅 When: Late May
📍 Where: Warsaw
🎬 Role: Japanese descent

📩 How to apply:
Send your application to casting@twarze.pl with the subject line "Japonia".

Please make sure to include:
• Your recent photos 📸
• Your phone number 📞
• 
Don’t miss out—send your submission today! Tag or share with anyone who might be a great fit! 👇  www.twarze.pl
________________________________________

items.text:
Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting. 

I would like to put it out there again that I am an actor based in KY and always ready for work!

I am 19 years old and 5’8”

According to many, my main types to play in film are 

1.  Intelligent outsider
2. Introverted lead
3. Anxious teen
4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.

4. Horror protagonist 
5. Artistic/creative student 
6. Emotionally observant character
7. Younger character in mystery/drama
8. Sarcastic teen

I have a lot of experience in film and theatre and always looking to expand! I am also looking for representation to take a step up in the industry.

Dm me for collaboration! 

When you dm I will send my resume and demo reel.
items.title: Hey everyone! I am taking the time today to put myself out there again, I do this about once every three months to stay fresh in people’s thoughts for casting.

items.text:
Reposting this so that everyone gets a chance to audition

DEADLINE: June 5th, 2026

CASTING CALL — Hope Among The Cosmos Short Film | Rockford, IL Area | Shooting last two weekends of September 2026 (19th, 20th, 26th, 27th)

Hope Among The Cosmos is a post-apocalyptic sci-fi story about a father and daughter on a routine trading run that goes very wrong. It's got action, heart, and some genuinely dark moments. Think practical effects, real locations, and a story worth telling.

This is a student/indie production, unpaid, but you'll get credit, meals on shoot days, and footage of your work when it's ready.

WHO I'M LOOKING FOR:

XANDER, Male, 30s-40s The dad. Big presence, quiet intensity, carries a lot of weight he doesn't talk about. This is a physical role but the emotional stuff is what really matters. If you can be still and terrifying at the same time, I want to meet you. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, but if you feel like this person, reach out.

MINA , Female, 12-15 Xander's daughter and the soul of this film. She's not a sidekick. She's watching her dad's world for the first time and figuring out what she believes. I need someone who can actually listen on camera, not just act. Same ethnicity preference as Xander, open to the right person.

LORELEI , Female, 30s Xander's wife. She's got a prosthetic leg, wears a tool belt, and looks like someone who's kept a family alive through sheer will. Small role but she needs to feel real the second she's on screen. Open to everyone.

LILITH , Female, around 7 The little sister. She's got one line and a stuffed rabbit with one eye and she will absolutely steal the scene. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

YOUNG XANDER , Male, 8-11 A flashback version of Xander as a kid, alone in a ruined outpost, finding something he shouldn't. Barely any dialogue, this is all about what's on his face. Preferred: African-American, mixed race, or biracial, open to all.

HELENE & ANORRA , Female, 8-12 each Two girls in the same flashback. They're ahead of Young Xander, picking through debris. Small roles but they help build the world. Open to all.

JACKSON , Male, 50s A farmer and trader who refuses to break even when things get very bad. He's got maybe five minutes of screen time and needs to make you feel everything. Open to all.

ELLEN (Jackson's Wife) , Female, 30s-40s Non-speaking. She died trying to protect her kid. The image says everything. You need to be comfortable with fake blood and staged death. Open to all.

JACKSON'S CHILDREN (x3) , Under 12 Also non-speaking. Same situation, this is heavy material and parents need to know that going in. Open to all.

BIONIC , Male, late 20s-40s The villain. Cybernetic arm, artificial eye, zero mercy. This role needs a separate prosthetic fitting before we shoot, plan for an extra session. If you want to play a genuinely scary person, this is your role. Open to all.

RAZOR , Male, late 20s-40s Bionic's partner and honestly the more terrifying of the two. Full metallic skull prosthetic, razor teeth, moves like something that used to be human. Full face appliance means a fitting session and extra time in the chair on shoot days. If you can commit to that and move like an animal, I want to talk. Open to all.

EXTRAS / BACKGROUND , Various ages Farmers, survivors, colony members. If you just want to be part of it, reach out. Open to all.

Heads up: This film has staged violence, fake blood, and some genuinely dark dramatic moments. Nothing unsafe happens on set, ever, but you should know what you're signing up for. For anyone under 18, a parent or guardian must be on set for the entire time; there are no exceptions.

Email jordanm.hannah89@gmail.com Subject: Hope Among the Cosmos Casting, [Your Name]

Send a photo, the role you're going for, your September availability, and a little about yourself. Experience helps, but it's not what I'm looking for first. A reel is welcome if you have one.

items.text:
Hello all!

 

One of our actors had to leave our production due to recent health complications. We are currently looking for someone to replace the characters of Egeus/Philostrate. This role will be double cast as it's relatively small scene wise (roughly only in 2.5 scenes)

 

No specific gender or race requirements; would prefer a taller actor 5'8+ but not a dealbreaker if this doesn't apply. This is a community theatre volunteer role; actors and crew are NOT paid.

 

Location: Virginia Highlands, ATL 30306

 

**Current remaining rehearsal schedule **

**-T/Th 7-10pm**

**-Sat 10am-2pm**

**-Wed 6/3  7-10pm**

**-Fri 6/5 6-9pm**

 

**TECH **

**6/6-6/10 (NO Sunday rehearsal)**

 

**SHOWS **

**6/11-6/20**

**Thurs-Sat @8pm**

**Sun & 6/20 @2pm**

 

If interested or know someone who may be a good fit, please email our director/producer at the following

 

Info Renegade Theatre Co. <[info@renegadetheatreco.org](mailto:info@renegadetheatreco.org)>

 

Renegade Theatre <[renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com](mailto:renegadetheatreatl@gmail.com)>

items.text:
**TELUS STORYHIVE SHORT FILM - CASTING CALL **

**UBCP ULB - PAID HONORARIUM **

**"A PART OF ME"**

***We are still seeking the roles below for our Storyhive short. Please submit ASAP!* **

**Director:** Tristan Miura

**Producers:** Allison Ham, Caylee Watrin 

**Category:** Indie Short Film - Produced by Telus Storyhive

**Casting Director:** Cathy Huynh 

**Union Status:** UBCP ULB 

**Compensation:** Paid Honorarium (see rates below). Food/crafty provided. Copy of film. IMDB credit.

**Filming Dates/Location:** July 3-6, 2026  / Vancouver, BC

**SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS:** Please email **ch17.film@gmail.com** with the subject heading [Your Name - Role Name] and include your headshot/photo, resume and demo reel (if applicable). 

**LOGLINE: **After suffering a double kidney failure during his semi-final baseball game, a Japanese-Canadian teenager begins to experience memories that aren’t his, and must uncover the truth behind his donor in order to heal. 

***OPEN TO NON-ACTORS - NO PREVIOUS ACTING EXPERIENCE REQUIRED***

**MILES - *****Character portrayed is Male, Mixed Japanese, 14-18***

Miles is the product of his environment. Growing up without a father meant growing up fast, but that doesn’t mean he doesn’t have the same struggles as any other teenager. Miles loves to be active, explore and learn, especially when it comes to baseball. He is always the first person to show up and the last to leave because being alone means sitting with himself. When he is suddenly stuck at home recovering from his kidney transplant, Miles must confront who he is and where he comes from. **LEAD ($100/day)**

**TAKEO - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 14-18***

Takeo is a first generation immigrant to Canada having moved from Japan 3 years before the War. Takeo loved baseball and dreamed of going pro. When he was interned Takeo would play baseball as an escape from the world, so when he notices Kiyoshi showing interest in his favourite sport he decides to take him under his wing. Takeo is loyal, showing love through honesty and kindness rather than false niceties. **SMALL SUPPORTING. *REAL BASEBALL EXPERIENCE AN ASSET ($50/day)**

**KIYOSHI - *****Character portrayed is Male, Japanese, 6-10***

Kiyoshi was only a child during the Second World War and his time in internment shifted his life forever. He loves baseball and looks up to all the players at Tashme. In spite of his incarceration, he still dreams of becoming a pro player. **SMALL SUPPORTING ($50/day)**

items.text: Join us THURSDAY! First class FREE! 😊

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

media.ocrText: May be an image of dancing and text that says 'I've been coming to this wonderful dance class for a year and Glenn is such an amazing teacher. He makes the classes fun but also appropriately challenging for beginners. I would definitely recommend this class to anyone who wants to start dance but doesn't have a a background in dance 18:34 18:34'

May be an image of text that says 'Chloe Hepplewhite really enjoy coming to dance on mondays, have so much fun CH 18:33 Amie I love coming to GLS Dance! feel so energised after the class and it's a friendly and fun space 18:33 Ollie Ritchie Been coming for over a year now! Really friendly, super to start and amazing community 18:33 Leylah Best way to start my week! Love the lighthearted atmosphere and have never felt judged for my abilities 18:33 Anna Mitchell 5 stars!! Really enjoy my Mondays 18:33'

items.text:
UPDATE: CASTING IS NOW CLOSED. No more submissions or emails will be accepted. Thank you for everyone who has reached out for interest in this film! 

Locations: Colorado 
DM's will not be accepted

For audition instructions and sides, please email indigenousactresschristine@gmail.com

Casting director will not accept any unsolicited inquiries from casting companies who took this post without permission.

The Musician's Index — Live Music Platform | The Musician's Index Magazine https://share.google/dI2vK6RJpHcBfYavm 🚨 EVERYONE WANTED 🚨
(Artists. Fans. Writers. Promoters. Venues. Brands.)

We just opened something different…
Not another app you scroll through —
this is where people actually connect.

🎤 Artists — come perform, get seen, get booked
💬 Fans — get closer than ever, tap in live
📰 Writers — we’re looking for voices, stories, coverage
🎟️ Promoters & Venues — bring your shows, sell your tickets
📢 Brands & Sponsors — promote right now while it’s early (ads starting at just $25)

This is where fans and performers unite… for real.
Live rooms. Real energy. Real people. No middleman feeling.

We’re building this from the ground up —
and the early ones always win the most.

If you’ve been waiting for a lane… this is it.

Tap in, claim your spot, and let’s run it up 🚀
https://themusiciansindexmagazine.com

sharedPost.text:
𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗮𝘁 𝗕𝗼𝗱𝘆𝗺𝗶𝗻𝗱 𝗧𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗮𝗽𝘆 𝗕𝗲𝗿𝗹𝗶𝗻: Belly Massage for Women & FLINTA*
​
The belly is one of the most emotionally and physically charged areas of the body — connected to stress, digestion, menstruation, hormones, emotions, vulnerability, and nervous system regulation.
​
Yet it’s also an area many people disconnect from, tense, hide, or ignore.
​
This treatment focuses exactly there: through integrative bodywork, belly massage, and nervous system-focused touch.
​
A powerful journey back to your center.
​
📍 In Berlin-Kreuzberg
​

items.text:
Alcohol Commercial Casting London
We are looking for stylish East Asian talents for an alcohol commercial shoot in London.

Chinese, Japanese and Korean talents are all welcome.

• Role

* Male 30+

* Real age must be 25+

* Good presence / stylish vibe preferred (similar to reference images)

* Motorcycle riding skills are a bonus

• Shoot Details

* London shoot

* Shooting window: Half day (4–5 hours) between June 8–12

* Fee: £500 all inclusive (usage included)

Please only apply if you are comfortable portraying alcohol appreciation during filming. Non-alcoholic drinks will be used on set.

Please only apply if you are comfortable with the included usage terms and fee.

Send headshot, spotlight link, showreels to:

[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

---

**酒类广告演员招募**

现招募气质较好的东亚裔演员出演酒类广告（伦敦拍摄）。

华裔、日本、韩国演员均可。

### 角色要求

*30+ 男性

* 真实法定年龄需25+

* 气质好、有质感（参考图风格）

* 会骑摩托加分

### 拍摄信息

* 伦敦拍摄

* 拍摄时间：6月8日–12日之间半天（4–5小时）

* 费用：£500 all inclusive（包含 usage）

请确认能够接受拍摄与酒类相关的表演内容后再申请。现场将使用无酒精饮品进行拍摄。

请确认接受 usage 条款及费用后再申请。

投递邮箱：

[sybillacasting@gmail.com](mailto:sybillacasting@gmail.com)

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - LONDON**

We are looking for two people for a music visualiser:

*• Boy (8–13)*
*• Older man (65–85)*

The roles portray the same person at different stages of life, so we're particularly interested in finding people who may share similar features, expressions, or energy.

The film consists of a single, contemplative shot of the pair sitting together on a park bench overlooking a landscape.

No acting experience is necessary.

Paid role. 

Half day shoot in London, early June.

If interested, please send a recent photo, age, and a little bit about yourself via DM or email: oscar@oscarkeys.com

items.text:
CASTING FOR CHARACTERS!

---

CHASING SHADOWS (Chasing Shadows) - Pilot Episode

A crime/thriller online tv series that follows Astrid Clarke, an FBI agent torn between her family and her job when her brother joins a dangerous gang.

*LOCATION:*

Peterborough, UK

*CASTING REQUIREMENTS: ALL APPLICANTS HAVE TO BE 18+*

**Simon Clarke: **American accent. Visibly looks late twenties

**Classroom people/Park goers:** Anything goes. Open to all. We will try to fit in some improv discussions, but it will depend on what happens on the day with times.

*DATE & TIME:*

Current dates are **June 29th - July 1st**, but you would be needed for only one day, dependant on which character you are chosen for.

*PAYMENT & EXPENSES:*

**Unpaid, **as this is being funded personally. **Travel** will be **covered** **within** the **Peterborough** area **only**. Food is covered.

*CONTACT:*

Either DM me here, or email me at:

hannahlwalker02@hotmail.com

*OTHER IMPORTANT INFO:*

Simon’s character has a specific wardrobe, so Simon will need to be brought on board by June 10th at the VERY latest. June 1st ideally. Other characters by June 10th also, to allow script revision and prep time.

There are some T’s and C’s for Simon, but those can be discussed privately, such as character reappearances.

Thanks!

items.text: Joe TenBroek, David Versace, Michael Pickard, and I want to give a huge shout-out to all the amazing creatives, collaborators, artists and all-stars that created this amazing Concept Pilot! We couldn't fit everyone into the video, so I ask you to please take a moment to check out The Hook IMDb page, and give these people the congratulations they deserve! Take a bow! Not too shabby for ST Park Productions first project!

sharedPost.text:
We wanted to do something special for the extraordinary cast and crew that we had aboard. We hope you enjoy the footage.

We are so grateful for the expertise, love, and support from these fine individuals. There is no concept pilot without you. Seriously. From the bottom of our hearts: Thank You.

Some may not be pictured here, due to limited BTS, but every single person on this project was so critical to it's success. Rock on, everyone!

Don't get Addicted, Get Hooked!!!

items.groupTitle: Casting Calls & Acting Auditions in London / UK
items.title: (no title)

items.text:
“Everything I ever wanted to say”

 

A pub, a book, a bunch of actors and all the things that were never meant to be said.

A play about actors looking for their next monologues from a tried and trusted book which inadvertently brings about reflection, resentment and revelations.

 

The team behind Rock, Paper, Scissors are looking for people to collaborate on a new piece. We’re looking for actors in their mid 20s-late 30s of all ethnicities and pronouns who have comedic timing and are open to bringing along a heartfelt piece they’ve always wanted to write. Something deep and personal they want to say which will be kept anonymous but will play a pivotal part of the performance. 
 

About us!

 

[https://thisweekculture.com/article/chess-hayden-rock-paper-scissors/](https://eur03.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fthisweekculture.com%2Farticle%2Fchess-hayden-rock-paper-scissors%2F&data=05%7C02%7Cemma.lo%40london.anglican.org%7C71460c89cf3c41f4778c08deba92d268%7Ceb60a373df9e411f87389f78780356d5%7C0%7C0%7C639153336926069653%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=TSsrnHUWaYLzKjKXEdxTf3%2BxlMk7bduZ9wJ2rE3dWVc%3D&reserved=0)

 

[https://playstosee.com/reviews/uk-reviews/london/rock-paper-scissors/](https://eur03.safelinks.protection.outlook.com/?url=https%3A%2F%2Fplaystosee.com%2Freviews%2Fuk-reviews%2Flondon%2Frock-paper-scissors%2F&data=05%7C02%7Cemma.lo%40london.anglican.org%7C71460c89cf3c41f4778c08deba92d268%7Ceb60a373df9e411f87389f78780356d5%7C0%7C0%7C639153336926095008%7CUnknown%7CTWFpbGZsb3d8eyJFbXB0eU1hcGkiOnRydWUsIlYiOiIwLjAuMDAwMCIsIlAiOiJXaW4zMiIsIkFOIjoiTWFpbCIsIldUIjoyfQ%3D%3D%7C0%7C%7C%7C&sdata=pRpcOQxQc7kX78dD%2B0X82D1OBTs5kbOngODJk8pDC%2Fk%3D&reserved=0)

 

Dates and London venue TBC

 

We understand everyone’s time is important and all writing material will be credited. This will be a profit share performance with tech rehearsals paid for.

 To express interest and for more info please contact: rpscasting2023@gmail.com

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
Looking for a FEMALE actor for a student short film to be shot by the end of June, early July. London based! 

Key Features 

Character name:- Stacy 

Age:- mid 20s 

Features:- Blonde hair preferred 

Brief- A freelance interior designer, married to a realtor, Darren. The night of their marriage anniversary is disrupted when Darren's ex suddenly drops by. 

Collaborative but food and stay provided. 

Email your interest to [aaryamasingh07@gmail.com](mailto:aaryamasingh07@gmail.com) OR DM on instagram at aaryamazz.

items.text:
Studio Lambert, the production company behind The Traitors and Gogglebox, have an exciting new quiz-show in development and we are looking for people to take part in a run through, filming on the Wednesday 3rd of June in London. There will be a small cash prize on offer.

To apply use the link here to fill in a form: [http://shorturl.at/No24Y](http://shorturl.at/No24Y)

This is a quiz show where knowledge is only part of the challenge. Players must answer a series of questions correctly to stay in the game.

To make it to the end and claim a share of the prize fund, players will need to decide who they can trust and who might be working against them to gain an advantage.

So, if you think you have the intelligence, nerve and strategy to go all the way, apply now.

***We are looking for London-based contestants.***

***You need to be 18+***

***If you are selected to participate, reasonable return travel expenses (from within the M25) will be reimbursed and snacks/drinks will be provided. There will also be a small cash prize to be won on the day.***

***The run-through will take place in a London-based location on the 3rd June 2026.***

***The run-through will be filmed but is not for broadcast.***

***Taking part in the run-through does not guarantee you a place in any potential future series, but you will have the chance to apply.***

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'STUDIO LAMBERT ?? STUDIO LAMBERT, HE MAKERS OF 'THE TRAITORS AND 'GOGGLEBOX', ARE LOOKING FOR LONDON-BASED CONTESTANTS FOR A NEW t QUIZ -THROUGH We are keen to hear from people with different levels of trivia knowledge whether you're α complete quiz buff or just enjoy playing along with your favourite game shows. FOR MORE INFO: https://shorturl.at/No24Y Ts Cs apply Applicants must be aged 18 and over.'

items.text:
🎤✨ CASTING CALL: EDDIE SOUTHER — SISTER ACT ✨🎤

Do you have comic swagger, pitches that hit the sweet spot, and the kind of charm that makes nuns double-take?

We want YOU to bring Eddie Souther to life!

Who: Male, 20s–40s • Energetic, hilarious, musical — physical comedy a PLUS
Must: Great comic timing, confident singing, nimble with tempo/style changes. Musical theatre experience preferred.

Show Dates: 1-5 July 2026
Rehearsals: Tue & Thu evenings and Sunday daytimes by schedule
Location: Brookside Theatre, Romford

Unpaid charity production

For more info pls DM us or email casting@brooksidetheatre.com

Know someone who’d slay this part? SHARE THIS — help us find our scene-stealer! 🌟🙏🎭

एखादा व्यक्ती महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री होऊ शकतो. पण शिक्षणा विना
दिग्दर्शक होऊ शकत नाही.

जर त्याच्याकडे मतदान कार्ड

असेल तर तो पात्र आहे.

त्यासाठी कोणतीही शैक्षणिक

पात्रता आवश्यक नसते.

#फिल्म_इंडस्ट्रीमधील_बोगस

#दिग्दर्शकांपासून_सावध_रहा.

यासाठी स्वतः सरकारने

पुढे येऊन कठोर पावले उचलावीत !

#रोहित_प्रकाशशेठ_पारख

#फिल्म_मेकर

98500-49002

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'एखादा व्यकी महाराष्ट्राचा मुख्यमंत्री शकतो. होऊ दिग्दर्शक पण शिक्षणाविना होऊ शकत नाही. DIRECTOR 프렌시인라 PRCUCTION AKE FITLL DARECOOR EPA DATE VOTE मुख्यमंत्री होण्यासाठी आवश्यक जर त्वाच्याकडे मतदान कार्ड असेल तर तो पात्र आहे. दिग्दर्शक होण्यासाठी आवश्यक संवंधित विषयांचे शिक्षण आवश्यक आहे. डिप्लोमा पदवी किंवा प्रमाणपत्र आवश्यक. चित्रपट निमितीचे ज्ञान, कौशल्य आणि अनुभव आवश्यक. फक्त सख्याबळ तयार करावे लागते. त्यासाठी कोणतीही शैक्षणिक पात्रता आवश्यक नसते. सतत शिक्षण, अध्ययन आणि प्रशिक्षम आवश्यक. फिल्म इंडस्ट्रीमधील बोगस दिग्दर्शकांपासून सावध रहा. हांसाठी स्वतः सरकारने पुढे येऊन कठोर पावले उचलावी! रोहित प्रकाशशेठ पारख फिल्म मेकर 98500-49002 पारदर्शकता प्रामाणिकता जवाबदारी'

items.text:
Moe Fields - the special bond between fathers and sons" is a Father's Day story for the ages. My father didn’t work on Wall St. My dad was a Plumber – a guy who was proud to work with his hands. I wrote this book to honor him--and ALL fathers; to celebrate the lessons they taught us.

The bloody image of the 1932 golden gloves competitor still inspires me. So, too, does his Navy WWII service. But one funny story from the book stands out.

The lesson in Lodi, NJ: I remember him towering over us, as kids. He was such a large guy. I remember the size of his hands swooping down to lift me to the sky.

But what I remember the most was his work ethic. I recall at 10-years old, when he took me on a job in Lodi New Jersey. It was a Cape Cod house. I remember it so well. We climbed the stairs.. I could smell the second-floor bathroom even as we walked down the hallway.

Dad walked into the bathroom and lifted the cover of the toilet. It was filled with paper and brown waste. He slowly turned to me, “Zach, stick your hands in the toilet and see what’s stopping it from flushing.”

The words hung in the air. I looked down at the toilet bowl and then up at my father’s 6’2” frame, 250 lbs., with those long arms that reached down past his waist. Those arms were connected to the largest set of hands I had ever seen.

Dad never gave instructions to his boys more than once. If we didn’t hear him or respond, the next experience was the back of his hand. The crack was so fast and furious; it would take several minutes before the pain registered in our brain. There was no sparing the rod. The boundary lines and expectations were clear.

I wasn’t about to challenge his instructions. I could see he was serious. I took off my coat and rolled up my shirt sleeves. I reached deep into the toilet bowl, with a determination I hoped he would be proud of. After several minutes fishing around for an answer I did not have, I pulled my hands out. The brown goo clung to my fingers. Once again, I looked up to dad for direction.

He paused for a minute to reinforce his message. He looked down at me. He then spoke slowly, “Zach, now you know the meaning of work! If you’re not afraid to get your hands dirty, you’ll be ok. Now, go wash your hands.”

The lesson from Lodi, New Jersey stayed with me. It’s a lesson I have used to shape my own ideas about life, work – and being a father.

Winner 2022 National Literary Award for Memoirs

Amazon best seller

Please repost and share with your favorite dad -- or son & daughter working at being a parent -- and wondering about their legacy.

See less

items.text:
**CASTING CALL for Child** **Actor**

Hello! We're looking for a young actor to join our re-creation of 'The Odyssey'! It's a musical feature to be posted on YouTube. This project is a continuation of my other productions, reaching over 800k views! 

*Project:*  'The Odyssey', based on 'EPIC: The Musical'. Specifically Circe's Island. 

*Producer:* Vega Cos Productions 

*Role:* Young girl, 4-7 yrs, playing a forest Nymph. No lines. Must be comfortable being held by strangers and looking nervous. No acting experience needed. 

*Date and Location:* June 12, likely 3 hours. Vancouver BC

*Pay:* Volunteer role with $50 honorarium

Please send head shot, demo reel and resume (if you have them) to lyra@vegacos.ca

topComments.text: Bonus points if she has naturally pointed ears? 😆

POWERHOUSE CASTING IS SEEKING FEMALE MARTIAL ARTISTS FOR A SODA COMMERCIAL SHOOTING IN URUGUAY, SOUTH AMERICA!

KARATE MASTER

Female. 30s–50s. Open Ethnicity.

We are looking for a fit, disciplined woman with real martial arts experience and strong physical coordination.

She should feel authentic performing karate chops, kicks, and sharp physical movements on camera — and fully commit to a powerful “HIYAHH!” while doing it.

COMPENSATION IF BOOKED & USED IN THE COMMERCIAL IS UPWARDS OF $6500.00 CAD PER PERSON

THIS IS A NON UNION JOB. IF YOU HAVE AN AGENT, PLEASE ASK THEM TO SUBMIT YOU OVER BREAKDOWNEXPRESS

THIS IS OPEN TO ALL CANADIAN RESIDENTS

***EVERYONE MUST HAVE A VALID PASSPORT WITH AT LEAST 6 MONTHS LEFT ON IT PRIOR TO EXPIRY***

IMPORTANT DATES:

• Callbacks: May 28, 2026 IN-PERSON IN TORONTO OR OVER ZOOM

• Shoot: June 9–11, 2026

• Location: Uruguay

• Travel Hold: June 5–13, 2026

***ALL FOOTAGE MUST BE SUBMITTED NO LATER THAN MONDAY, MAY 25TH @ 9:00AM EST

SUBMISSION LINK:

[https://projectsodakarate.castingcrane.com/](https://projectsodakarate.castingcrane.com/?fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExQVFDdXdEaGZGZDZrek1ZbnNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6JfxH7Sitr_nR762p0YvCKU7xsbq3vRarkh3Ax2oFA9jQw3hhJ34W8zG1Tbg_aem__h5f9nvC_LwiuVXalUUoqg)
