items.text:
**AUDITION NOTICE**

*The Tragicall Historie of Doctor Faustus* by Christopher Marlowe

Directed by Melanie White - Rough Magic Theatre

AUDITIONS:

Saturday June 13: 10am-3pm

Sunday, June 14: 10am-1pm 

Callbacks: Sunday, June 14 1pm-5pm

Pay: $250 stipend. 

Union and Non-Union performers welcome.

BIPOC performers are strongly encouraged to audition!

What is your soul worth? Craving unlimited knowledge and influence, John Faustus makes a literal deal with the devil: 24 years of magic and power in exchange for his mortal soul. At first, the bargain feels thrilling, but as time runs out, Faustus is forced to confront the true cost of his ambition. Darkly funny, provocative, and surprisingly modern, *Doctor Faustus* explores what happens when the cost of power is everything. 

*Doctor Faustus* will play at the Vancouver Fringe Festival, performing September 10-20, 2026 on Granville Island. Rehearsals will be in the evenings and weekends in July and August, 2-4 times a week. 

Please submit a headshot and resume to [roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com](mailto:roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com) and mention which role(s) you think you are right for.

We will contact you to set up an audition time. Please be prepared to read from sides (provided in advance) and to perform a 1-2 minute classical monologue of your choice.

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

**FAUSTUS**: 20s-early 30s, any race, male-presenting. John Faustus is a brilliant but arrogant scholar who becomes dissatisfied with the limits of scholarly knowledge. Hungry for power, pleasure, and ultimate understanding, he makes a pact with the devil, trading his soul for magical abilities and worldly rewards. Although intelligent and ambitious, Faustus is deeply flawed by pride, insecurity, and an inability to repent.

**ENSEMBLE** (aka Everyone Else): **Three** roles, 20s-40s, any race, any gender. These three actors play a combined 30+ characters, so we are looking for versatile character actors who can create a distinct persona with just a few strokes. Strong physical and vocal transformation skills are essential. Experience with heightened text, clowning, comedy, and/or physical theatre is an asset.

Please note that the role of **MEPHISTOPHELES** has already been cast.

(Graphic design: Sidney Martin)

items.summary:
**AUDITION NOTICE**

*The Tragicall Historie of Doctor Faustus* by Christopher Marlowe

Directed by Melanie White - Rough Magic Theatre

AUDITIONS:

Saturday June 13: 10am-3pm

Sunday, June 14: 10am-1pm 

Callbacks: Sunday, June 14 1pm-5pm

Pay: $250 stipend. 

Union and Non-Union performers welcome.

BIPOC performers are strongly encouraged to audition!

What is your soul worth? Craving unlimited knowledge and influence, John Faustus makes a literal deal with the devil: 24 years of magic and power in exchange for his mortal soul. At first, the bargain feels thrilling, but as time runs out, Faustus is forced to confront the true cost of his ambition. Darkly funny, provocative, and surprisingly modern, *Doctor Faustus* explores what happens when the cost of power is everything. 

*Doctor Faustus* will play at the Vancouver Fringe Festival, performing September 10-20, 2026 on Granville Island. Rehearsals will be in the evenings and weekends in July and August, 2-4 times a week. 

Please submit a headshot and resume to [roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com](mailto:roughmagictheatrevancouver@gmail.com) and mention which role(s) you think you are right for.

We will contact you to set up an audition time. Please be prepared to read from sides (provided in advance) and to perform a 1-2 minute classical monologue of your choice.

CHARACTER BREAKDOWN:

**FAUSTUS**: 20s-early 30s, any race, male-presenting. John Faustus is a brilliant but arrogant scholar who becomes dissatisfied with the limits of scholarly knowledge. Hungry for power, pleasure, and ultimate understanding, he makes a pact with the devil, trading his soul for magical abilities and worldly rewards. Although intelligent and ambitious, Faustus is deeply flawed by pride, insecurity, and an inability to repent.

**ENSEMBLE** (aka Everyone Else): **Three** roles, 20s-40s, any race, any gender. These three actors play a combined 30+ characters, so we are looking for versatile character actors who can create a distinct persona with just a few strokes. Strong physical and vocal transformation skills are essential. Experience with heightened text, clowning, comedy, and/or physical theatre is an asset.

Please note that the role of **MEPHISTOPHELES** has already been cast.

(Graphic design: Sidney Martin)

Hello! I hope this is okay to share here. 

I am producing a show for Peckham Fringe called Romeo Must Die which is on Monday 1st and Tuesday 2nd June at Theatre Peckham.

On Tuesday 2nd we have a matinee paired with an industry focused Q&A with our award winning team of creatives. Tickets are only £15 you get a show AND the Q&A. Perfect for recent grads, up and coming artists or anyone who is curious to find out more about how we got here. 

If you are interested you can book below and do feel free to come and introduce yourself to me on the day! 🌹

Hi everyone! My name is Maayan, I’m a Los Angeles-based actress and a graduate of the Acting for Camera AOS program at AMDA.

I’m currently looking to connect with filmmakers, student directors, photographers, and creatives for upcoming projects, short films, and collaborations.

I’m bilingual (Hebrew/English), comfortable with both dramatic and comedic material, and always excited to work on meaningful and visually interesting projects.

Headshots/reel available upon request — would love to connect!

Lauren Patrice Nadler Studio's where the stars are always rising 🤩

Posting here to invite inquiries for class and coaching.  LPN Studios currently has space in group class, in-person in North Hollywood and online from anywhere in the world. 

Expert teachings, with a coach who has assisted transforming students into successful actors, in projects you've all seen streaming on TV and in movies in theaters. 

For info on those success stories (a few appear on this video) and more: www.laurenpatricenadlerstudios.com 

Lauren Patrice Nadler Studio's where the stars are always rising 🤩

For time sensitive coaching reach out at laurenpatricenadler@gmail.com

items.text:
CVS Health Services Customers Testimonial Casting
[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)
* Has CVS had a significant, positive impact on your health / life?
* Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail?
* Have you benefited from any CVS health services such as pharmacy deliveries, Minute Clinic mental health services, women's health services, etc?
* Do you have a story of how CVS has helped you along your health journey?

If you answered "yes" to any of these questions, then we want to hear from you! *(All selected talent will be compensated.)*

CVS and Edelman are looking for real people across the country to share their stories on how the different CVS health services have played an important, emotional, or memorable role in their health journey. These empowering testimonial videos will share stories of how CVS, CVS Pharmacy, Signify Health, MinuteClinic, CVS Specialty Pharmacy, etc. have helped everyone from college students to caregivers to cancer survivors to people who just love CVS. Whether you shop at CVS regularly, have visited the MinuteClinic, relied on the Specialty Pharmacy, or benefited from preventive screenings offered at a CVS location - we want to hear from you. 

*Selected candidates will take part in a filmed interview in late May / early June, where they will discuss how CVS is a part of their life.*

**If you are interested in being considered for this project, please fill out our casting application at **[[https://cvs.castingcrane.com/](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)](https://cvs.castingcrane.com/)** or email us directly at casting@pairedupmedia.com**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'REAL PEOPLE CASTING c CVS HEALTH CUSTOMERS WELLNESS WE S SS S Has CVS had positive impact on your health & wellness journey? Do you regularly visit CVS Pharmacy, MinuteClinic, Specialty Pharmacy, or CVS Retail? Have you benefited from any of the many health services offered through CVS? If you answered "YES" to any of these questions, we want to hear from you! CASTING@PAIREDUPMEDIA.COM PAIRED + UP MEDIA'

items.text:
AUDITION NOTICE !! - TRUE WEST
Playbox Productions is excited to announce:

**TRUE WEST**
**by Sam Shepard**

Directed by **Samuel G.C. Muñoz**

**IN-PERSON AUDITIONS:**
Sunday, June 14, 2026
Starting at 9:00AM

**LOCATION:**
2820 Smallman Street
Pittsburgh, PA 15222

**AUDITION REQUIREMENTS:**
• Prepare TWO contrasting 1-minute monologues (Dark comedy preferred)
• Bring headshot & resume

**CALLBACKS:**
Wednesday, June 17 at 10:00AM
(Same location)
*Please make sure you are available for callbacks if auditioning.

**NOTE:** To be considered, you MUST:
• Fill out the Google Form (Link in Bio)
• Book an audition slot through the True West Auditions page link
If you do not reserve a time-slot, you will NOT have an audition appointment.

**PERFORMANCE DATES:**
September 24 – October 4, 2026
(10 Performances Over Two Weekends)

**Three Stories Theater**
937 Liberty Ave
Pittsburgh, PA

**COMPENSATION:**
All roles are paid. Stipends provided. (based on overall production performance) 

**Questions or scheduling conflicts?**
Email: playboxpgh@gmail.com
https://playboxproductions.com

**NOTE:** We are still looking for a few Stage Management production members to join the team, if that is any interest to you please email us ASAP: **playboxpgh@gmail.com**

**Tickets @** https://playbox.ticketspice.com/true-west

Presented by PLAYBOX Productions in partnership with the Pittsburgh Cultural Trust.
#TrueWest #SamShepard #PittsburghTheatre #Auditions #CastingCall Actors PittsburghActors PlayboxProductions TheatreAuditions LiveTheatre PittsburghArt

items.text: Now Casting! Non Union Women, late 40's to mid 60's of Middle Eastern descent who have or can do an accent from the Middle Eastern region (Syrian, Turkish, Armenian, Lebanese, Iraqi, Kuwaiti, Iranian/Persian, Jordanian, Omani, Yemeni, Israeli, Palestinian, Egyptian, Qatari, Saudi) for a video that will be a part of a museum exhibit about work and culture. Shoots in early July and pays $500 for a half day (4-5 hours). To submit email your resume and current photo to submissions@asylumcasting.com!

Agency Books Open for Ethnically Diverse Talent until 6pm Fri 29th May!!!!
Elite Creative Casting currently have their boutique books open for children age 5-17yrs.... models from ethnically diverse backgrounds, particularly East Asian heritage.

Theatre, Film, TV Talent Agent 

Looking for actors & triple threat performers- for musical/theatre/film/tv castings 

If you are looking for an agent or want to move across to a different agent these ladies are fab :) it's a boutique agency and they work really hard for their clients. 

Just need to send current headshots, name, age, location, bit about yourself, Spotlight link if applicable, showreel etc.... to 

Welcome@elitecreativecasting.co.uk
